title: maranta humilis
intro: Maranta humilis, also known as the prayer plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The leaves of the Maranta humilis plant can be used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
